patternCandidates.name: 31-Category Tutorial Taxonomy
patternCandidates.description: 31 technology categories organized for 'build from scratch' learning. Useful as a reference for organizing skill categories or learning paths.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Cross-reference against 72-skill index for category gap analysis.

patternCandidates.name: Curated Link Format Pattern
patternCandidates.description: **Language**: _Title_ (link) format with ToC anchors. Standard awesome-list pattern.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Skill retirement process design
knowledgeCandidates.description: This repo is a case study in what happens when a curated collection grows without a retirement/archival process. 486K stars, 462 open issues, 1 commit/90d. Apply this lesson to JASON-OS skill lifecycle.
knowledgeCandidates.relevance_to_home: Directly applicable to managing 72+ skills. Prevention of stagnation pattern.

knowledgeCandidates.name: 'Build from scratch' framing for Domain 01
knowledgeCandidates.description: Feynman principle applied to system understanding. Structure JASON-OS Internal Archaeology as 'how each system was built' narratives rather than 'what exists' inventories.
knowledgeCandidates.relevance_to_home: Reframe Domain 01 output format. Narrative > inventory.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Celebrity stagnation lifecycle
knowledgeCandidates.description: Full lifecycle: community enthusiasm → commercial acquisition → maintenance bottleneck → dormancy. Useful as a cautionary case study for any future community distribution model.
knowledgeCandidates.relevance_to_home: Relevant if JASON-OS skills are ever published/shared.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Shell/CLI tutorial collection
knowledgeCandidates.description: 7 shell tutorials (C, Go, Rust). Canonical references if JASON-OS needs custom command dispatch.

contentCandidates.name: Build Your Own React (Pomber)
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: React 19 in SoNash. Fiber, reconciliation, hooks from scratch.

contentCandidates.name: Didact: DIY React
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Virtual DOM diffing. Complementary to Pomber.

contentCandidates.name: Write Yourself a Git
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Git object model. Better hook/worktree design.

contentCandidates.name: Regex Matching Can Be Simple and Fast

antiPatternCandidates.name: Single-file-everything pattern
antiPatternCandidates.description: 390 links in one README.md. Works at small scale, unmaintainable at large scale. Watch for same impulse in EXTRACTIONS.md, MEMORY.md, SKILL_INDEX.md.
antiPatternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Applies to any artifact that becomes a dumping ground for 'everything of type X'.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Inline license without LICENSE file
antiPatternCandidates.description: CC0 in README footer but no LICENSE file. GitHub API reports 'no license'. Automated tools can't detect it. Always include a machine-readable LICENSE file.
antiPatternCandidates.relevance_to_home: If JASON-OS skills are ever published, include actual LICENSE files.

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both are curated lists with celebrity stagnation. public-apis has validation scripts that codecrafters lacks.
